title: Dual reactive planning for heterogeneous robots appears in RA-L
summary: New work on heterogeneous robots with evolving capabilities in unknown environments is indexed by DBLP and linked with code.

title: T-ASE paper on local-observation reactive temporal logic planning
summary: Human-robot planning under local observations, with the demo video linked from the homepage.

title: Thin and stacked object grasping paper in IEEE TAI
summary: DHRNet plus MP-PC resources are highlighted with code and a local YouTube cover card.

title: Multiple temporal-logic planning papers added
summary: ICRA, IROS, RA-L, TIE, and T-ASE records are searchable in the publications section.

title: Near-eye-tracking guided grasping demo linked
summary: The video section now uses fast local covers that open YouTube in a new tab.

title: High-resolution grasping preprint and code connected
summary: HRG_Net is linked from both publications and projects for easier discovery.
